message:
test(proptest): add 13 property tests for ars_replay coverage gaps

AR-15 through AR-28: Verdict::Fail/Inconclusive serde, all 5 FailReason
variant serde, Assessment::Rejected/InsufficientData serde, is_validated()
for non-Validated variants, incident_id() across all variants,
count_inconclusive_as_pass flag behavior, stats validated/rejected tracking,
ReplaySession serde roundtrip, pass rate accuracy, InsufficientData counts.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
